{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322200048455C6ED55314996DA1D6"}"},"total":88},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617864993979269912","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的不错，对于五条悟的能力开发来说，要比iivv那个半吊子好不少，唯一的缺点是每个副本的原主角团描述太多了，尤其是第一个，第二个西幻世界改善了不少，不知道第三个副本后面怎么样，总之战斗爽🤗","text_exts":[{"e":10,"s":7,"text":"五条悟","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BA%94%E6%9D%A1%E6%82%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180848996DA1D6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617864993979269912%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227517116122995379225%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BA%94%E6%9D%A1%E6%82%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":93,"s":90,"text":"战斗爽","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%88%98%E6%96%97%E7%88%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774180848996DA1D6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617864993979269912%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227517116122995379225%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%88%98%E6%96%97%E7%88%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773674132,"group_id":"7517116122995379225","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4ufspmbexjyyKGZL3snWwVgi7E1lmreHEP1oRpvImSI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3068060657522905","user_name":"芝士双层堡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3068060657522905","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7517116122995379225","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚出会涨，喜欢的朋友们可以给个五星支持一下，酸奶在这里谢谢所有读者朋友的追读，催更还有支持，谢谢谢谢大家！】
吴凡在工作途中撞了大运，本以为会这样结束，却没成想被系统绑定，开局觉醒了五条悟能力。
吴凡：“我无敌了！”
系统：“宿主将进入漫画之中完成您的任务”
吴凡：“我有着五条悟的能力，那么一定是主角吧！”
系统：“您是路人。”
吴凡：“啊？”
于是吴凡就走向了在各个作品乱入的路而一去不复返

前两个世界剧情虽然快但主要设计没问题，都挺好的。能感觉作者想写主角够强但不想太碾压平推一切，好人方我很满意但是反派感觉有点套路化。个人感觉剧情也有点相似，都是先震慑一下，喂几个敌人，再和本地boss决战。不过作者大大知道哪里有问题就没问题ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ✧，期待第三个世界剧情。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773672302,"group_id":"7517116122995379225","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"此时苦难如朝露","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9o5WtSSXLJbpFeMnbYK5LdQ2XM5xMe8i3REVXnn0gGg","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/048f89f126984823a25bbc3c378ddb21~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705620&x-signature=Tx8FrSamjUBTZLBSW2OosREWud0%3D","user_id":"2198651805646304","user_name":"落羽之偶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2198651805646304","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7517116122995379225","book_info":{"abstract":"【评分刚出会涨，喜欢的朋友们可以给个五星支持一下，酸奶在这里谢谢所有读者朋友的追读，催更还有支持，谢谢谢谢大家！】
